projects.name: goldenmatch
projects.description: Polyglot data-quality + entity-resolution toolkit with a Learning Memory loop. GoldenCheck profiles -> GoldenFlow standardizes -> GoldenMatch dedupes (zero-config, 97% F1) -> GoldenPipe orchestrates. MCP per package, multi-arch containers, Airflow DAGs, plus a localhost browser workbench for rules, runs, and labeling.
